TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == micidekay a kulit anipatizen tu luma' nu yincumin (1)u sapatizen nu yincumin paleman sa mikilim tu sapatizen. nai tahekaia kilang ku sasangan nuheni, sapad nu ba'tu.auk kusa. kyusa izaw ku nu ba'tu a luma' nu kilang a luma' nu auk a luma', mahiniay a nisangan, pakaycahana tu is i ni sangaan nu niyazu' a helkal kaaykasulecalecad, izaw ku caay amin kalecad azihan. (2)ienal ku Amis mueneng, mumisangaan unheni tu lima' unuali' atu nu auk ku yadahai, ulabu nu luma' ulilal tu a kakubian, u auk ku sapibacal, i tepal nu lilal si pacal tu palid izaw ku sasingalan i tapiingan nu panan, i hecal izaw aca ku lilal atu balicit, izaw ku duma izaw ku palul, atu palatah atu sakakawawen, kyusa izaw ku nu ba'tu a luma' nu kilang a luma' mahiniay a nisangaan, pakayca hana tu is i ni sangaan nu niyazu' a helkal kaaykasulecalecad, izaw ku caay amin kalecad azihan, nilaalitin u sapatizen nu yincumin, paleman sa mikilim tu sapatizen, == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenga ==
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mi ¶id…ôkaj a kur~…ĺit anipatiz…ôn tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu jin ¶umin (*)u sapatiz…ôn nu jin ¶umin par~…ĺ…ôman sa mikir~…ĺim tu sapatiz…ôn. nai tańß…ôkaia kir~…ĺaŇč ku sasaŇčan nuńß…ôni, sapad nu ba Ē~ °tu.auk kusa. kjusa izaw ku nu ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu auk a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßiniaj a nisaŇčan, pakaj ¶ańßana tu is i ni saŇčaan nu nijazu Ē~ ° a ńß…ôr~…ĺkar~…ĺ kaajkasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, izaw ku ¶aaj amin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad azińßan. (*)i…ônar~…ĺ ku amis mu…ôn…ôŇč, mumisaŇčaan unńß…ôni tu r~…ĺima Ē~ ° unuar~…ĺi Ē~ ° atu nu auk ku jadańßai, ur~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ur~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu a kakubian, u auk ku sapiba ¶ar~…ĺ, i t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ si pa ¶ar~…ĺ tu par~…ĺid izaw ku sasiŇčar~…ĺan i tapiiŇčan nu panan, i ńß…ô ¶ar~…ĺ izaw a ¶a ku r~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺi ¶it, izaw ku duma izaw ku par~…ĺur~…ĺ, atu par~…ĺatańß atu sakakawaw…ôn, kjusa izaw ku nu ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mańßiniaj a nisaŇčaan, pakaj ¶a ńßana tu is i ni saŇčaan nu nijazu Ē~ ° a ńß…ôr~…ĺkar~…ĺ kaajkasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, izaw ku ¶aaj amin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad azińßan, nir~…ĺaar~…ĺitin u sapatiz…ôn nu jin ¶umin, par~…ĺ…ôman sa mikir~…ĺim tu sapatiz…ôn, == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇča ==
S.FORM: == kakiliman == micidekay a kulit anipatizen tu luma' nu yincumin (1)u sapatizen nu yincumin paleman sa mikilim tu sapatizen. nai tahekaia kilang ku sasangan nuheni, sapad nu ba'tu.auk kusa. kyusa izaw ku nu ba'tu a luma' nu kilang a luma' nu auk a luma', mahiniay a nisangan, pakaycahana tu is i ni sangaan nu niyazu' a helkal kaaykasulecalecad, izaw ku caay amin kalecad azihan. (2)ienal ku Amis mueneng, mumisangaan unheni tu lima' unuali' atu nu auk ku yadahai, ulabu nu luma' ulilal tu a kakubian, u auk ku sapibacal, i tepal nu lilal si pacal tu palid izaw ku sasingalan i tapiingan nu panan, i hecal izaw aca ku lilal atu balicit, izaw ku duma izaw ku palul, atu palatah atu sakakawawen, kyusa izaw ku nu ba'tu a luma' nu kilang a luma' mahiniay a nisangaan, pakayca hana tu is i ni sangaan nu niyazu' a helkal kaaykasulecalecad, izaw ku caay amin kalecad azihan, nilaalitin u sapatizen nu yincumin, paleman sa mikilim tu sapatizen, == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenga ==
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mi ¶id…ôkaj a kur~…ĺit anipatiz…ôn tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu jin ¶umin (*)u sapatiz…ôn nu jin ¶umin par~…ĺ…ôman sa mikir~…ĺim tu sapatiz…ôn. nai tańß…ôkaia kir~…ĺaŇč ku sasaŇčan nuńß…ôni, sapad nu ba Ē~ °tu.auk kusa. kjusa izaw ku nu ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu auk a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßiniaj a nisaŇčan, pakaj ¶ańßana tu is i ni saŇčaan nu nijazu Ē~ ° a ńß…ôr~…ĺkar~…ĺ kaajkasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, izaw ku ¶aaj amin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad azińßan. (*)i…ônar~…ĺ ku amis mu…ôn…ôŇč, mumisaŇčaan unńß…ôni tu r~…ĺima Ē~ ° unuar~…ĺi Ē~ ° atu nu auk ku jadańßai, ur~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ur~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu a kakubian, u auk ku sapiba ¶ar~…ĺ, i t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ si pa ¶ar~…ĺ tu par~…ĺid izaw ku sasiŇčar~…ĺan i tapiiŇčan nu panan, i ńß…ô ¶ar~…ĺ izaw a ¶a ku r~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺi ¶it, izaw ku duma izaw ku par~…ĺur~…ĺ, atu par~…ĺatańß atu sakakawaw…ôn, kjusa izaw ku nu ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mańßiniaj a nisaŇčaan, pakaj ¶a ńßana tu is i ni saŇčaan nu nijazu Ē~ ° a ńß…ôr~…ĺkar~…ĺ kaajkasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, izaw ku ¶aaj amin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad azińßan, nir~…ĺaar~…ĺitin u sapatiz…ôn nu jin ¶umin, par~…ĺ…ôman sa mikir~…ĺim tu sapatiz…ôn, == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇča ==
